label: sale.order

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.help_text: This is a name that helps you keep track of your different campaign efforts, e.g. Fall_Drive, Christmas_Special

source_id.name: source_id
source_id.help_text: This is the source of the link, e.g. Search Engine, another domain, or name of email list

medium_id.name: medium_id
medium_id.help_text: This is the method of delivery, e.g. Postcard, Email, or Banner Ad

activity_state.name: activity_state
activity_state.help_text:
Status based on activities
Overdue: Due date is already passed
Today: Activity date is today
Planned: Future activities.

activity_exception_decoration.name: activity_exception_decoration
activity_exception_decoration.help_text: Type of the exception activity on record.

activity_exception_icon.name: activity_exception_icon
activity_exception_icon.help_text: Icon to indicate an exception activity.

message_needaction.name: message_needaction
message_needaction.help_text: If checked, new messages require your attention.

message_has_error.name: message_has_error
message_has_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

message_has_error_counter.name: message_has_error_counter
message_has_error_counter.help_text: Number of messages with delivery error

message_has_sms_error.name: message_has_sms_error
message_has_sms_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

commitment_date.name: commitment_date
commitment_date.help_text: This is the delivery date promised to the customer. If set, the delivery order will be scheduled based on this date rather than product lead times.

date_order.name: date_order
date_order.help_text:
Creation date of draft/sent orders,
Confirmation date of confirmed orders.

origin.name: origin
origin.help_text: Reference of the document that generated this sales order request

reference.name: reference
reference.help_text: The payment communication of this sale order.

require_signature.name: require_signature
require_signature.help_text: Request a online signature from the customer to confirm the order.

require_payment.name: require_payment
require_payment.help_text: Request a online payment from the customer to confirm the order.

prepayment_percent.name: prepayment_percent
prepayment_percent.help_text: The percentage of the amount needed that must be paid by the customer to confirm the order.

validity_date.name: validity_date
validity_date.help_text: Validity of the order, after that you will not able to sign & pay the quotation.

journal_id.name: journal_id
journal_id.help_text: If set, the SO will invoice in this journal; otherwise the sales journal with the lowest sequence is used.

fiscal_position_id.name: fiscal_position_id
fiscal_position_id.help_text: Fiscal positions are used to adapt taxes and accounts for particular customers or sales orders/invoices.The default value comes from the customer.

pricelist_id.name: pricelist_id
pricelist_id.help_text: If you change the pricelist, only newly added lines will be affected.

amount_paid.name: amount_paid
amount_paid.help_text: Sum of transactions made in through the online payment form that are in the state 'done' or 'authorized' and linked to this order.

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.help_text:
The ISO country code in two chars. 
You can use this field for quick search.

company_price_include.name: company_price_include
company_price_include.help_text: Default on whether the sales price used on the product and invoices with this Company includes its taxes.

expected_date.name: expected_date
expected_date.help_text: Delivery date you can promise to the customer, computed from the minimum lead time of the order lines.

terms_type.name: terms_type
selection: Add a link to a Web Page

pending_email_template_id.name: pending_email_template_id
pending_email_template_id.help_text: The template of the pending email that must be sent asynchronously.

bl_awb.name: bl_awb
bl_awb.help_text: This information can be copied to the invoice for customer reference.

etd.name: etd
etd.help_text: Select the Expected time of departure

eta.name: eta
eta.help_text: Select the Expected time of arrival

etd_ts.name: etd_ts
etd_ts.help_text: Estimated departure from the first transshipment port

eta_ts.name: eta_ts
eta_ts.help_text: Estimated arrival at the final transshipment port

project_id.name: project_id
project_id.help_text: A task will be created for the project upon sales order confirmation. The analytic distribution of this project will also serve as a reference for newly created sales order items.

timesheet_total_duration.name: timesheet_total_duration
timesheet_total_duration.help_text: Total recorded duration, expressed in the encoding UoM, and rounded to the unit

workflow_hints:
- - **Sub-records**: After creating the parent record, create sub-records via the sub-model fields: order_line, purchase_line_ids. Always preview the parent first, then create sub-records in a second step.
- All required fields must be filled. Use preview action to check what's missing.
- partner_id is required — always confirm the customer/vendor before creating.
